name: opencode-companion
description: Delegate coding tasks from Codex to OpenCode on any OpenAI-compatible backend, with blocking results, token usage, and crash-safe result recovery.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding tasks to OpenCode and cheap OpenAI-compatible models
interface.longDescription: Use OpenCode as a coding companion from within Codex. Delegate implementation or investigation tasks to any OpenAI-compatible backend (a local aggregator, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Doubao, ...), block until the real result returns with a token-usage line, watch live token-progress heartbeats, and recover finished answers even if a run is interrupted.
defaultPrompt: Delegate a coding task to OpenCode
